fields.name: Description
fields.default: Each season, we collaborate with world-class designers to create a collection inspired by the natural world.

default.name: Handcrafted Collection
default.description: Keep your phone, keys, and wallet together, so you can lose everything at once.

default.name: Organized Desk Collection
default.description: The rest of the house will still be a mess, but your desk will look great.

default.name: Focus Collection
default.description: Be more productive than enterprise project managers with a single piece of paper.
